name: telecommunications_mutual_aid_request_redwood_tru_loy
premise: A BGP misconfiguration is steering traffic through a jurisdiction with stricter data-retention law than customer contracts allow. In Telecommunications, the situation tagged internally around telecommunications mutual aid request redwood tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The organization’s past incidents make truth feel morally loud today, while loyalty is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Marco Santos
agents.identity: I am Marco Santos, the accountable executive on this bridge in Telecommunications. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Fatima Morales
agents.identity: I am Fatima Morales, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Telecommunications. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on loyalty.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on loyalty for immediate traction on truth.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Marco Santos must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Marco Santos do?
